summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 bug fixes in Mitti Basket cart system. All bugs verified as FIXED. Bug 1: Cart drawer +/- buttons now increment by 1kg for mango products and 250g for gm products (makhana). Bug 2: All checkout fields (name, phone, email, address, pincode) are marked as required. Bug 3: Product cards show 'IN CART' badge and '[qty] ADDED | Tap to edit' pill when item is in cart. Bug 4: Cart drawer has only ONE close button (shadcn's built-in X). All regression tests passed.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

passed_tests: Bug 1: Cart drawer +/- buttons increment by 1kg for mango products (5kg -> 6kg -> 5kg)
Bug 1: Cart drawer +/- buttons increment by 250g for gm products (250gm -> 500gm -> 250gm)
Bug 2: All checkout fields are marked as required (name, phone, email, address, pincode)
Bug 2: Form validation prevents submission without required fields
Bug 3: 'IN CART' badge visible on product card top-right when item is in cart
Bug 3: Pill shows '[qty] Added | Tap to edit' text in green for in-cart items
Bug 3: Options panel shows cart editing mode with current quantity and 1kg/250g increment controls
Bug 4: Only ONE close button in cart drawer (shadcn's built-in X)
Regression: New items show 'Add to Cart' pill and normal add flow
Regression: Cart subtotal updates correctly (₹3,598 for 2 items, ₹3,958 after increment)
Regression: Festive products (Thekua, Tilkut, Khajur Sweets) show 'Coming Soon' badge and pill
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warning about missing aria-describedby for DialogContent in cart drawer - consider adding SheetDescription for accessibility
Code quality is good - proper use of data-testid attributes for testing
Cart state management via sessionStorage works correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 bug fixes verified, all regression tests passed)

test_credentials: No auth credentials needed - public marketing website with cart functionality
seed_data_creation: None - used sessionStorage to inject cart items for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: 1) Cart qty increment uses 1kg for kg products, 250g for gm products. 2) All checkout fields required. 3) IN CART badge and '[qty] Added' pill show for in-cart items. 4) Single close button in cart drawer. Key testing notes: Use page.evaluate() to trigger hover events due to marquee animation intercepting pointer events. Cart persists in sessionStorage with key 'mitti_basket_cart'.
